mapper.select: SELECT VA.ID, VA.NAME, VA.TEXT_EN, VA.TEXT_JP, VA.CHAPTER_ID, VA.CHANGE_LINE FROM VERSES VA ORDER BY VA.ID ASC
SELECT VA.ID, VA.NAME, VA.TEXT_EN, VA.TEXT_JP, VA.CHAPTER_ID, VA.CHANGE_LINE FROM VERSES VA WHERE VA.ID = #{id}
SELECT VA.ID, VA.NAME, VA.TEXT_EN, VA.TEXT_JP, VA.CHAPTER_ID, VA.CHANGE_LINE FROM VERSES VA WHERE VA.CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} ORDER BY VA.ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VERSES (ID, NAME, TEXT_EN, TEXT_JP, CHAPTER_ID, CHANGE_LINE) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{textEn}, #{textJp}, #{chapterId}, #{chnageLine})
